summary: i18n system testing complete. Language switching works correctly for EN/PT/ES/DE across landing page, login screen, navigation, customize panel, profile panel, and onboarding carousel. Language persists in localStorage. Fixed ProfilePanel Sign Out button hardcoded text. Dashboard component has untranslated strings (greetings, Focus Habit, mood widget).

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard.jsx does not use useLanguage hook - greetings (Good morning/afternoon/evening), 'Focus Habit', 'How are you feeling?', and other dashboard text remain in English regardless of selected language

landing_page_i18n.english: PASS - Hero: 'Build habits that stick', Button: 'Get Started'
landing_page_i18n.portuguese: PASS - Hero: 'Crie hábitos que duram', Button: 'Começar'
landing_page_i18n.spanish: PASS - Hero: 'Crea hábitos que perduran', Button: 'Empezar'

login_screen_i18n.tabs: PASS - Sign In/Sign Up tabs translate correctly
login_screen_i18n.buttons: PASS - Submit and Google sign-in buttons translate

navigation_i18n.desktop_sidebar: PASS - All 9 nav items translate (Heute, Gewohnheiten, Statistiken, etc.)
navigation_i18n.mobile_bottom_tabs: PASS - Today, Habits, Medals, Profile translate
navigation_i18n.hamburger_menu: PASS - All menu items including Sign Out translate

customize_panel_i18n.sections: PASS - Appearance, Language, Branding, Profile, Data, Categories, Account all translate
customize_panel_i18n.labels: PASS - Theme, Accent Color, App Name, Your Name, etc. translate

onboarding_carousel_i18n.slide_tags: PASS - Welcome, Step 1, Step 2, TARS, etc. translate

dashboard_i18n.greeting: FAIL - 'Good evening' not translated (hardcoded in Dashboard.jsx)
dashboard_i18n.mood_widget: FAIL - 'How are you feeling?' not translated

action_items: Dashboard.jsx needs to import useLanguage hook and use t() function for: greetings (goodMorning/goodAfternoon/goodEvening), 'Focus Habit' (focusHabit), 'How are you feeling?' (howFeeling), and other dashboard text. Translations already exist in translations.js under 'dashboard' key.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n system architecture is well-designed with LanguageContext, useLanguage hook, and centralized translations.js
LanguageSelectorInline component provides good UX with flag buttons
Language persistence via localStorage works correctly
Dashboard.jsx is the only major component not using the translation system - needs refactoring to add useLanguage hook
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/ProfilePanel.jsx - Fixed hardcoded 'Sign Out' to use t('common.signOut')
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n system works for most components. Dashboard.jsx needs to be updated to use useLanguage hook for translations. The translations already exist in translations.js under the 'dashboard' key. ProfilePanel Sign Out button was fixed.

verified_features.language_selector_customize: Working - Dropdown selector in Customize panel
verified_features.navigation_translations: Working - Desktop and mobile nav translate
